name: claude-agents-skills
description: A curated collection of specialized plugins for Claude Code, extending Claude's capabilities with domain expertise and task automation

plugins.name: tax-preparation
plugins.description: US tax preparation: deduction analysis, RSU calculations, form processing, and tax optimization

plugins.name: portfolio-analyzer
plugins.description: Investment portfolio analysis, risk assessment, asset allocation, and strategic recommendations

plugins.name: retirement-planner
plugins.description: Retirement readiness assessment, Social Security optimization, and withdrawal strategies

plugins.name: research-consolidator
plugins.description: Synthesize research from multiple AI models and sources with confidence scoring and gap analysis

plugins.name: jr-kraken-18u-navy-lineup
plugins.description: Jr. Kraken 18U Navy hockey lineup building, game strategy, and player management

plugins.name: dev-tools
plugins.description: Development agents: bug tracking, DB architecture, security scanning, performance optimization, documentation
